---
title: 'Flavia Wolfe has been gone 17 months and 17 days'
date: '2020-04-04T06:38:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3849001019928976487'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/flavia-wolfe-has-been-gone-17-months.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal">Flavia has been gone 17 months and 17 days | There are 17 months and 17 days from June 25, 2018 to December 12, 2019 | What an odd thought.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p></div>
